name: General Dynamics Corporation
description: General Dynamics Corporation is a global aerospace and defense company that offers a broad portfolio of products and services in business aviation; ship construction and repair; land combat vehicles, weapons systems and munitions; and technology products and services. The company operates through four business segments: Aerospace, Marine Systems, Combat Systems, and Technologies. It is a leading producer of Gulfstream business jets, nuclear-powered submarines for the U.S. Navy, and land combat platforms like the M1 Abrams tank. Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, General Dynamics serves customers in the defense, intelligence, and commercial sectors worldwide.

investment_theses.company_type: Prime Contractor / Marine Systems & Land Systems
